title: andrew@coupit.io
html:
TL;DR

  • Apr 23 2021, 11:35pm Apple Note: title and body are a single mailto:andrew@coupit.io link — captured contact-stub for someone named Andrew at coupit.io. Classic contact-stub subtype.
  • Coupit.io — domain unresolved in vault. Likely a small startup or product Yahir was reaching out to (or being reached by) in spring 2021, the crypto club / pre-OSU-fall window. No follow-up note in corpus.
  • "Andrew" here is NOT Andrew Pruhliere (the friend) — Pruhliere is Yahir's personal-friend cluster, not a startup contact. Different Andrew. Disambiguation noted; no andrew-coupit stub created (single mention, no further context).
  • Email is business-published / pasted-from-public-context (mailto link from a website or signature) — not redacted, but flagged as third-party PII. If coupit.io turns out to be defunct, the address has no live recipient.
  • Graph value: yet another data point in the contact-stub subtype — Yahir's pre-CRM habit of saving leads as title-only notes.

Source quote

mailto:andrew@coupit.io

Open questions

  • What was coupit.io? Coupon / loyalty startup? Crypto-adjacent? The domain name doesn't resolve in vault and warrants a quick web check if it ever recurs.
  • Was Yahir reaching out about a project, or was Andrew reaching out about bromenu / an early Yahir venture?
  • Any 2021-Q2 emails in the questions notebook that reference this thread?

Privacy

  • andrew@coupit.io retained in summary — third-party business email, captured by Yahir from an external source (not personal correspondence content). Flagging here for awareness; if Yahir wants it scrubbed in a densify pass, easy fix.

Wikilinks

andrew pruhliere · corvallis crypto club · bromenu · osu
